all_findings.description: Agents with identical names in both user and project scopes
all_findings.impact: Precedence confusion, unnecessary context cost, maintenance burden
all_findings.recommendation: Consolidate: Keep project-specific versions, remove user-level duplicates

all_findings.description: Agents with 3 instances (likely from folder reorganization)
all_findings.recommendation: Identify canonical version, delete other 2 instances

all_findings.impact: Routing confusion, unclear which analyzer/generator gets invoked
all_findings.recommendation: Namespace analyzers by domain or merge similar ones

all_findings.impact: Routing confusion, unclear which analyzer/generator gets invoked
all_findings.recommendation: Namespace generators by domain or merge similar ones

all_findings.impact: Routing confusion, unclear which analyzer/generator gets invoked
all_findings.recommendation: Namespace orchestrators by domain or merge similar ones

all_findings.impact: Routing confusion, unclear which analyzer/generator gets invoked
all_findings.recommendation: Namespace validators by domain or merge similar ones

all_findings.description: README/INDEX/MANIFEST files duplicated across skill directories
all_findings.impact: Context bloat (these files load as skills), potential confusion
all_findings.recommendation: Rename to non-.md extension (e.g., README.txt) or move to support docs

all_findings.description: Modern Web API skills duplicated between user and project scopes
all_findings.impact: Precedence confusion, 2x context cost for these frequently-used skills
all_findings.recommendation: Keep user-level versions only (cross-project), delete project copies

all_findings.description: Browser-specific skills duplicated between user and project
all_findings.impact: Context bloat, unclear which version is authoritative
all_findings.recommendation: Keep user-level chromium/pwa skills, project uses via inheritance

all_findings.description: Real functional skills (not docs) duplicated across scopes
all_findings.impact: Major context cost, unclear precedence, hard to maintain
Missing model optimization, "default" varies by account type
all_findings.recommendation: Apply model policy: haiku (scan/index), sonnet (code), opus (reasoning)

all_findings.impact: Good: skills inherit from invoking context
all_findings.recommendation: Keep as-is, unless specific skills need dedicated models
Review for compression, move examples to separate files

all_findings.impact: Skills must exist and be accessible

all_findings.recommendation: Ensure clear delegation contracts, no overlapping responsibilities

top_10_priorities.impact: Missing model optimization, "default" varies by account type
top_10_priorities.recommendation: Apply model policy: haiku (scan/index), sonnet (code), opus (reasoning)
